secret_patterns.description: JWT-shape leak in a session or plan markdown file. Threat model: the 2026-04-09 Apec incident where a JWT was pasted into a session doc, then panic-commented out at commit time. Hard-block in this exact shape.
Anthropic API key. Belongs in .env or .copilot-credentials.md.
OpenAI API key (also catches many sibling sk- formats). Belongs in .env.

doc_coverage.description: Firewall behavior must stay reflected in SKILLS.md. Replaces the wall-clock 4h staleness gate.
Activation flow + PRO gating documented in SKILLS.md.
Audit log details. Warn-only initially; will move to block after the SKILLS.md section is fleshed out.
Policy schema. Warn-only initially; SKILLS.md section is a follow-up.

deploy_verify_hosts.description: Activation server. After any deploy that touches server/, probe within 60s. Maps to CLAUDE.md DEPLOY = VERIFY LIVE rule.

bypass_tokens.description: Documented escape hatch for production-critical hotfixes. Reason recorded in the audit log; 5-minute TTL. Beats undocumented --no-verify.
